INNER DIMENSIONS OF THE PRAYER

Imam ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah (4. 7514)

oA \ sat pu

Imam ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah [d. 751]

Inner DIMENSIONS of the PRAYER

Comparison of Differing Experience between Performing Sa/ab and Listening (to Music)

being a tranlation of his work ‘Asrar al-Salah wa’l-Farg wa’l-Mawaganah bayna dawg al-Salih wa’l Sama’

“Tt is the believers who are successful: those who are humble in their prayer.”

Inner Dimensions of the

And Comparison of Differing Experience between Performing Salah and Listening (to Music)

by Imam Ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah

W: www.darassunnah.com E: info@darassunnah.com E: daar-us-sunnah@mail.com

British Library Cataloguing in publication Data. A catalogue record for this book is available from the British Library.

Title: Inner Dimensions of the Prayer by Imam ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah "Translated from the original Arabic by Ayman ibn Khalid

Short Biography of Ibn al-Qayyim al-Jawziyyah His Name His Birth and Education His Teachers and Shaykhs His Manners and Worship His Students and Works Statements of the Scholars about him His Death

1.1 The Salah is tranquility for worshippers and Allah’s

gift to the believers 1.2 The Likeness of the Heatt to the arth 1.3. The heart becomes dry when devoid of Tawhid 1.4 Divisions of People in regards to the actions of the limbs 1.5 Parable in Three Types of People

1.6 The Sectet and Essence of Salah 1.7 Experiencing detachment [from Allah] during the intervals between the five daily prayers 1.8 Discussion on Wadi’ 1.9 Perfecting one’s s servitude attending the masjid 1.10 Servitude in a-Takbir 1.11 Servitude in a/-Istftab [The Opening Supplication] 1.12 The state of the ‘abd in al-Qird’ah and al-Isti‘ddhah 1.13 Ibn Taymmiyah’s advice to Ibn Qayyim 1.14 The state of the ‘abd in al-Fatibah 1.15 The meanings of a-hamd 1.16 Servitude in “Lord of all the worlds” 1.17 Servitude in “The All-Merciful (al-Rabman), The Most Merciful (al-Rabim)” 1.18 Servitude in “Master of the Day of Judgement” 1.19 The meanings of thand’ and tamyjid 1,20 Servitude in “You Alone we worship” 1.21 The wisdom behind a/-Jsti‘anah 1.22 The Need of the ‘abd for “Guide us to the Straight...” 1.23 ‘Types of guidance the ‘abd is in need of 1.24 Servitude in raising the hands 1.25 Servitude in a-Ruki‘ 1.26 Servitude in a/-Qiyam 1.27 Servitude in a/-Sujid 1.28 The Sa/éh is built upon five pillars 1.29 The state of the “bd between two Prostrations 1.30. ab-Istigfar between Two Prostrations 1.31 The Wisdom behind the Second Prostration 1.32 Servitude in a/-Tashabhud and the meaning of al-Tabiyat 1.33 The wisdom behind interlinking a/-Tabiyyat and al-Salawat

1.34 The Noblest words after the Qur’an

1.35 Servitude in al-Taslim

1.37 The Meaning of the two Shahadahs in a/-Tabiyyat 1.38 Sending a/-Salat upon the Prophet (4g)

1.39 The Sunnah of the adhan

CHAPTER TWO The Secret of Salah lies in devotion to Allah 2.1 Devotion to Allah in sa/ah is of three levels 2.2 Devotion in salah 2.3 Discussion on a/-Taslim 2.4 Exposition on the fruits of a/-Khushi‘ 2.5 The fruit of salah is true devotion to Allah 2.6 Why salah gives us comfort? 2.7 From the benefits of Sa/dh is nearness to Allah

CHAPTER THREE Distinction between the people of a/-Sama‘ and the people of Salah

CHAPTER FOUR 4.1 al-Sama‘ of the people of Truth

CHAPTER FIVE 5.1 The Types of Hearts

APPENDIX ONE Tbn al-Qayyim on Khushi‘

APPENDIX TWO Tbn al-Qayyim on Hypoctitical Khushi‘

May Allah have mercy upon him

HE IS THE IMAM, THE HAFIZ, the exegete, the legal jurist, Shaykh al-Islam: Abi ‘Abdullah Shamsu-d-Din Muhammad Ibn Abii Bake - better known as Ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah.

His Birth and Education:

He was born into a noble and knowledgeable family on 7" Safar 6911 in the village of Zar’, near Damascus, Syria.

From an early age he set about acquiring knowledge of the Islamic sciences from the scholars of his time. Describing his desire for knowledge, al-Hafiz Ibn Rajab, Dhayl Tabaqat-l-Hanabilah [4/449] said, ‘He had an intense love for knowledge, for books, publications and writings.’

Ibn Kathir, a/-Bidayah wa-n-Nihayah [14/235] said, “He acquired from such books what others could not acquire, and he developed

a deep understanding of the books of the Salaf and of the Khalaf’

His Teachers and Shaykhs:

‘They include Shihab an-Nablusi, Qadi'Taqi ad-Din ibn Sulayman, from whom he studied hadith; Qadi Badr ad-Din ibn Jama‘ah; Safi ad-Din al-Hindi; Isma‘ll ibn Mubammad al-Harrani, from whom he studied fiqh and usiil; and also his father, ftom whom he learnt the laws of inheritance.

However, the most notable of his teachers was Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah, whom he accompanied and studied under for sixteen years. Al-Hafiz Ibn Kathir (14/234) said, “He attained great proficiency in many branches of knowledge; particularly knowledge of tafsir, hadith, and usil. When shaykh ‘Taqi ad-Din ibn Taymiyyah returned from Egypt in the year 712H, he stayed with the shaykh until he died; learning a great deal of knowledge from him, along with the knowledge that he had already occupied himself in attaining, So he became a unique scholar in many branches of knowledge.’

His Mannets and Worship:

Many of his students and contemporaries have born witness to his excellent character and his manners of worship. Ibn Rajab (4/ 450) said,

He - may Allah have mercy on him - was constant in worship and performing the night prayer, reaching the limits in lengthening his prayer and devotion. He was constantly in a state of dhikr and had an intense love for Allah. He also had a deep love for turning to Allah

INNER DIMENSIONS OF PRAYER

in repentance, humbling himself to Him with a deep sense of humility and helplessness. He would throw himself at the doors of Divine obedience and servitude. Indeed, I have not seen the likes of him with regards to such matters.

Ibn Kathir (14/234) said,

He was constant in humbly entreating and calling upon his Lord. He recited well and had fine manners. He had a great deal of love and did not harbour any envy ot malice towards anyone, nor did he seek to harm or find fault with them. I was one of those who most often kept company with him and was one of the most beloved of people to him. T do not know of anyone in the world in this time, who is a greater worshipper than him. His prayer used to be very lengthy, with prolonged bowing and prostrations. His colleagues would criticise him for this, yet he never retorted back, nor did he abandon this practice. May Allah bestow His mercy upon him,

His Students and Works:

Amongst his most prominent students were: Ibn Kathir (d.774H), adh-Dhahabt (d.748H), Ibn Rajab (d.751H) and Ibn ‘Abdu-l-Hadi (d.744H), as well as two of his sons, Ibrahim and Sharafu-d-Din ‘Abdullah.

Tbnu-l-Qayyim authored over sixty works. His books and writings are characterised by theit touching address to the heart and soul, as well as their accuracy, precision, strength of argument and depth of research.

In the field of figh and usiil, his writings include: [Vimu-lMuwagqqibin; Turuqu-l-Elukmiyyah; Ighathatu-l-Lahfan; Tubfatu-lMawlad; Abkam Ahlu-l-Dhimmal, and al-Furisiyyah.

In the field of hadith and sitah they include: Tabdbib Suman Ali Dawiid; al-Manarn-LMunif; Faw@’id al-Hadithiyyah; Jala’u-l-Afham; and Zadu-l-Ma‘ad.

In the field of beliefs: [jtima' al-Juyash al-lslamiyyab; as-Sawa‘iqu-1Mursalah; Shifév-l‘Alil; Hadiyn-l-Arwab al-Kafiyatu-sh-Shafiyaly, and Kitab ar-Rih.

In the field of akhlag (morals) and tazkiyah (purification): Madariju-s-Salikin; ad-D@ wa-d-Dawa; al-Wabilu-s-Sayyib; al-Faw@id; Risélatu-t-Tabnkiyyah; Miftéh Dar as-Sa‘adah; and ‘Uddatu-s-Sabirin.

In the sciences of the Qur'an: at-Tibyan fi Aqsimi-l-Quran, and Amthal al-Qur’an.

In language and miscellaneous issues: Bada’ al-Fawad.

Two books have also been written collating the exegetical comments of ibn al-Qayyim from his vatious works: Tafsir alQayyim and Tafsir al-Munir.

A few of his works have also been translated into the English

language: the Magnificent Journey; the Invocation of God; Medicine of the Prophet; 24d a/-Ma‘ad.

INNER DIMENSIONS OF PRAYER

Statements of the Scholars about him: Ibn Rajab (4/44) said,

He had deep knowledge concerning tafsir and the fundamentals of the religion, reaching the highest degree concerning them both. Similar was the case in the field of hadith, with regards to understanding its meanings, subtleties and deducing rulings from them. Likewise was the case in the field of fiqh and its usil, as well as the Arabic language. He did a great service to these sciences. He was also knowledgeable about rhetoric, grammar, and su/#k as well as the subtleties and details that occur in the speech of the people of tasawnuf.

Al-Hafiz Ibn Hajar, ad-Duraru-/-Kaminah (4/21),

He possessed a courageous spirit as well as vast and comptchensive knowledge. He had deep knowledge concerning the differences of opinions of the Scholars and about the ways of the Salaf.

Ibn Hajar also said in his commendation to ar-Raddu-I-Wafir,

And if there were no virtues of shaykh Tagi ad-Din [Ibn Taymiyyah], except for his famous student, shaykh Shamsu-d-Din ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah - the author of many works, which both his opponents and supporters benefited from - this would be a sufficient indication of his [Ibn Taymiyyah’s] great position.

al-Hafiz Ibn Nasir ad-Dimishqj, a Raddu-/-Wafir [p. 69] said,

He possessed knowledge of the sciences, especially tafsir and usil.

‘Abii Bakr Muhammad Tbn al-Muhib said, as found in his letter, “I said in front of our Shaykh, al-Mizzi, ‘Is Tbnu-]-Qayyim at the same level as Ibn Khuzaymah?” He replied, ‘He is in this time, what Ibn Khuzaymah was in his time.”

As-Suyiiti, Bughyatu-1-Wi'at [1/62] said,

His books had no equal and he strove and became one of the great Imams in [the field of] tafsir, hadith, the Book, the Sunnah, uri‘, and the Arabic language.

‘Ali al-Qaei, al-Mirgat [8/251],

It will be clear to whoever aspires to read the explanation of Manaxilu-s-S@irin (i.e. Madarij as-Salikin\, that they [Ibn Taymiyyah and Ibnu-l-Qayyim] are from the great ones of Abiu-s-Sunnah wa-l-Jama'ah, and from the awliyd of this Ummah.
content_id:
DIMENSI BATIN SALAH

Imam Ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah (w. 751H)

oA \ sat pu

Imam Ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah [w. 751H]

DIMENSI BATIN SALAH

Perbandingan Pengalaman yang Berbeda antara Melaksanakan Salah dan Mendengarkan (Musik)

merupakan terjemahan dari karyanya 'Asrar al-Salah wa'l-Farq wa'l-Muwazanah bayna dawq al-Salah wa'l Sama'

"Sungguh beruntung orang-orang yang beriman: yaitu mereka yang khusyuk dalam salah mereka."

Dimensi Batin

Dan Perbandingan Pengalaman yang Berbeda antara Melaksanakan Salah dan Mendengarkan (Musik)

oleh Imam Ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah

W: www.darassunnah.com E: info@darassunnah.com E: daar-us-sunnah@mail.com

British Library Cataloguing in publication Data. Catatan katalog untuk buku ini tersedia di British Library.

Judul: Dimensi Batin Salah oleh Imam Ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah "Diterjemahkan dari bahasa Arab asli oleh Ayman ibn Khalid

Biografi Singkat Ibn al-Qayyim al-Jawziyyah Namanya Kelahiran dan Pendidikannya Guru-guru dan Syaikhnya Akhlak dan Ibadahnya Murid-murid dan Karya-karyanya Pernyataan Para Ulama tentangnya Wafatnya

1.1 Salah adalah ketenangan bagi para hamba dan karunia

Allah bagi orang-orang beriman 1.2 Perumpamaan Hati dengan Bumi 1.3 Hati menjadi kering ketika kosong dari tawhid 1.4 Pembagian Manusia dalam hal amalan anggota tubuh 1.5 Perumpamaan Tiga Jenis Manusia

1.6 Rahasia dan Hakikat Salah 1.7 Merasakan keterpisahan [dari Allah] di antara waktu-waktu salah lima waktu 1.8 Pembahasan tentang Wudu 1.9 Menyempurnakan penghambaan seseorang dengan menghadiri masjid 1.10 Penghambaan dalam Takbir 1.11 Penghambaan dalam al-Istiftah [Du'a Pembuka] 1.12 Keadaan hamba dalam al-Qira'ah dan al-Isti'adzah 1.13 Nasihat Ibn Taymiyyah kepada Ibn Qayyim 1.14 Keadaan hamba dalam al-Fatihah 1.15 Makna-makna al-hamd 1.16 Penghambaan dalam "Tuhan semesta alam" 1.17 Penghambaan dalam "Yang Maha Pengasih (al-Rahman), Yang Maha Penyayang (al-Rahim)" 1.18 Penghambaan dalam "Penguasa Hari Pembalasan" 1.19 Makna-makna tsana' dan tamjid 1.20 Penghambaan dalam "Hanya kepada-Mu kami menyembah" 1.21 Hikmah di balik al-Isti'anah 1.22 Kebutuhan hamba akan "Tunjukilah kami jalan yang lurus..." 1.23 Jenis-jenis petunjuk yang dibutuhkan hamba 1.24 Penghambaan dalam mengangkat tangan 1.25 Penghambaan dalam Ruku' 1.26 Penghambaan dalam al-Qiyam 1.27 Penghambaan dalam al-Sujud 1.28 Salah dibangun di atas lima pilar 1.29 Keadaan hamba di antara dua Sujud 1.30 al-Istighfar di antara Dua Sujud 1.31 Hikmah di balik Sujud Kedua 1.32 Penghambaan dalam al-Tasyahhud dan makna al-Tahiyyat 1.33 Hikmah di balik keterkaitan al-Tahiyyat dan al-Shalawat

1.34 Kata-kata Paling Mulia setelah al-Quran

1.35 Penghambaan dalam al-Taslim

1.37 Makna dua Syahadah dalam al-Tahiyyat 1.38 Mengucapkan Shalawat atas Nabi (ﷺ)

1.39 Sunnah Adzan

BAB DUA Rahasia Salah terletak pada kekhusyukan kepada Allah 2.1 Kekhusyukan kepada Allah dalam salah memiliki tiga tingkatan 2.2 Kekhusyukan dalam salah 2.3 Pembahasan tentang al-Taslim 2.4 Penjelasan tentang buah al-Khusyu' 2.5 Buah salah adalah kekhusyukan sejati kepada Allah 2.6 Mengapa salah memberikan kita ketenangan? 2.7 Di antara manfaat salah adalah kedekatan kepada Allah

BAB TIGA Perbedaan antara ahli al-Sama' dan ahli Salah

BAB EMPAT 4.1 al-Sama' menurut ahli Kebenaran

BAB LIMA 5.1 Jenis-jenis Hati

LAMPIRAN SATU Ibn al-Qayyim tentang Khusyu'

LAMPIRAN DUA Ibn al-Qayyim tentang Khusyu' yang Munafik

Semoga Allah merahmatinya

BELIAU ADALAH SANG IMAM, AL-HAFIZH, ahli tafsir, ahli fiqh, Syaikh al-Islam: Abu 'Abdullah Syamsuddin Muhammad Ibn Abi Bakr - yang lebih dikenal sebagai Ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah.

Kelahiran dan Pendidikannya:

Beliau lahir dalam keluarga yang mulia dan berilmu pada tanggal 7 Safar 691H di desa Zar', dekat Damaskus, Suriah.

Sejak usia dini beliau mulai menuntut ilmu-ilmu keislaman dari para ulama pada zamannya. Menggambarkan kecintaannya terhadap ilmu, al-Hafizh Ibn Rajab, Dzayl Thabaqat al-Hanabilah [4/449] berkata, 'Beliau memiliki kecintaan yang sangat mendalam terhadap ilmu, terhadap buku-buku, penerbitan, dan tulisan-tulisan.'

Ibn Kathir, al-Bidayah wa'n-Nihayah [14/235] berkata, "Beliau memperoleh dari buku-buku tersebut apa yang tidak dapat diperoleh orang lain, dan beliau mengembangkan

pemahaman yang mendalam tentang kitab-kitab para Salaf dan para Khalaf."

Guru-guru dan Syaikh-syaikhnya:

Di antara mereka adalah Syihab an-Nablusi, Qadhi Taqiyyuddin ibn Sulayman, dari beliau ia mempelajari hadith; Qadhi Badruddin ibn Jama'ah; Shafiyyuddin al-Hindi; Isma'il ibn Muhammad al-Harrani, dari beliau ia mempelajari fiqh dan ushul; dan juga ayahnya, dari beliau ia mempelajari ilmu waris.

Namun, guru yang paling berpengaruh baginya adalah Syaikh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah, yang beliau dampingi dan beliau pelajari ilmunya selama enam belas tahun. Al-Hafizh Ibn Kathir (14/234) berkata, "Beliau mencapai kecakapan yang tinggi dalam banyak cabang ilmu; khususnya ilmu tafsir, hadith, dan ushul. Ketika Syaikh Taqiyyuddin ibn Taymiyyah kembali dari Mesir pada tahun 712H, beliau tinggal bersama syaikhnya hingga wafat; mempelajari banyak ilmu darinya, di samping ilmu yang telah beliau sibukkan diri untuk menuntutnya. Sehingga beliau menjadi ulama yang unik dalam banyak cabang ilmu."

Akhlak dan Ibadahnya:

Banyak murid dan ulama sezamannya yang menjadi saksi atas akhlak dan ibadah beliau yang luar biasa. Ibn Rajab (4/450) berkata,

Beliau - semoga Allah merahmatinya - senantiasa tekun beribadah dan melaksanakan salah malam, mencapai batas dalam memanjangkan salah dan kekhusyukannya. Beliau senantiasa dalam keadaan berdhikr dan memiliki kecintaan yang sangat mendalam kepada Allah. Beliau juga memiliki kecintaan yang dalam untuk bertaubat kepada Allah

DIMENSI BATIN SALAH

dengan merendahkan diri kepada-Nya dengan penuh kerendahan dan ketidakberdayaan. Beliau senantiasa menghempaskan dirinya di pintu-pintu ketaatan dan penghambaan ilahi. Sungguh, aku tidak pernah melihat yang seperti beliau dalam hal-hal semacam ini.

Ibn Kathir (14/234) berkata,

Beliau senantiasa tekun dalam memohon dengan rendah hati dan berseru kepada Tuhannya. Beliau membaca al-Quran dengan baik dan memiliki akhlak yang mulia. Beliau memiliki kasih sayang yang besar dan tidak menyimpan kedengkian atau kebencian terhadap siapa pun, tidak pula berusaha menyakiti atau mencari-cari kesalahan mereka. Aku termasuk orang yang paling sering menemaninya dan termasuk orang yang paling dicintainya. Aku tidak mengetahui seorang pun di dunia pada masa ini yang lebih tekun beribadah darinya. Salahnya biasa sangat panjang, dengan ruku' dan sujud yang lama. Teman-temannya mengkritiknya karena hal ini, namun beliau tidak pernah membalas, dan tidak pula meninggalkan amalan ini. Semoga Allah melimpahkan rahmat-Nya kepadanya.

Murid-murid dan Karya-karyanya:

Di antara murid-muridnya yang paling terkemuka adalah: Ibn Kathir (w. 774H), adz-Dzahabi (w. 748H), Ibn Rajab (w. 751H) dan Ibn 'Abdul Hadi (w. 744H), serta dua putranya, Ibrahim dan Syarafuddin 'Abdullah.

Ibn al-Qayyim menulis lebih dari enam puluh karya. Buku-buku dan tulisan-tulisannya dicirikan oleh penyampaiannya yang menyentuh hati dan jiwa, serta ketelitian, ketepatan, kekuatan argumentasi, dan kedalaman penelitiannya.

Dalam bidang fiqh dan ushul, tulisan-tulisannya meliputi: I'lam al-Muwaqqi'in; Thuruq al-Hukmiyyah; Ighatsatu'l-Lahfan; Tuhfatu'l-Mawlud; Ahkam Ahl adz-Dzimmah; dan al-Furusiyyah.

Dalam bidang hadith dan sirah, tulisan-tulisannya meliputi: Tahdzib Sunan Abi Dawud; al-Manar al-Munif; Fawa'id al-Haditsiyyah; Jala'u'l-Afham; dan Zad al-Ma'ad.

Dalam bidang aqeedah: Ijtima' al-Juyusy al-Islamiyyah; ash-Shawa'iq al-Mursalah; Syifa' al-'Alil; Hadi al-Arwah; al-Kafiyatu'sy-Syafiyyah; dan Kitab ar-Ruh.

Dalam bidang akhlak dan tazkiyah (penyucian jiwa): Madarij as-Salikin; ad-Da' wa'd-Dawa'; al-Wabil ash-Shayyib; al-Fawa'id; Risalatu't-Tabukiyyah; Miftah Dar as-Sa'adah; dan 'Uddatu'sh-Shabirin.

Dalam ilmu-ilmu al-Quran: at-Tibyan fi Aqsam al-Quran, dan Amtsal al-Quran.

Dalam bahasa dan masalah-masalah lainnya: Bada'i al-Fawa'id.

Dua buku juga telah ditulis yang menghimpun komentar-komentar tafsir Ibn al-Qayyim dari berbagai karyanya: Tafsir al-Qayyim dan Tafsir al-Munir.

Beberapa karyanya juga telah diterjemahkan ke dalam bahasa

Inggris: the Magnificent Journey; the Invocation of God; Medicine of the Prophet; Zad al-Ma'ad.

DIMENSI BATIN SALAH

Pernyataan Para Ulama tentangnya: Ibn Rajab (4/44) berkata,

Beliau memiliki pengetahuan yang mendalam tentang tafsir dan dasar-dasar agama, mencapai derajat tertinggi dalam keduanya. Demikian pula halnya dalam bidang hadith, dalam hal memahami makna-maknanya, kehalusan-kehalusannya, dan mengambil hukum darinya. Begitu juga dalam bidang fiqh dan ushulnya, serta bahasa Arab. Beliau memberikan kontribusi besar terhadap ilmu-ilmu ini. Beliau juga berpengetahuan tentang retorika, tata bahasa, dan suluk serta kehalusan-kehalusan dan rincian-rincian yang terdapat dalam ucapan-ucapan ahli tasawwuf.

Al-Hafizh Ibn Hajar, ad-Durar al-Kaminah (4/21),

Beliau memiliki semangat yang gagah berani serta ilmu yang luas dan menyeluruh. Beliau memiliki pengetahuan yang mendalam tentang perbedaan pendapat para ulama dan tentang metode-metode para Salaf.

Ibn Hajar juga berkata dalam pujiannya terhadap ar-Radd al-Wafir,

Dan seandainya tidak ada keutamaan lain dari Syaikh Taqiyyuddin [Ibn Taymiyyah] kecuali muridnya yang terkenal, Syaikh Syamsuddin Ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah - penulis banyak karya, yang baik lawan maupun pendukungnya mendapat manfaat darinya - maka ini sudah cukup sebagai petunjuk keagungan kedudukannya [Ibn Taymiyyah].

Al-Hafizh Ibn Nashir ad-Dimasyqi, ar-Radd al-Wafir [hal. 69] berkata,

Beliau menguasai berbagai ilmu, terutama tafsir dan ushul.

Abu Bakr Muhammad Ibn al-Muhibb berkata, sebagaimana terdapat dalam suratnya, "Aku berkata di hadapan Syaikh kami, al-Mizzi, 'Apakah Ibn al-Qayyim setingkat dengan Ibn Khuzaymah?' Beliau menjawab, 'Beliau di zamannya seperti Ibn Khuzaymah di zamannya.'"

As-Suyuthi, Bughyatu'l-Wu'at [1/62] berkata,

Buku-bukunya tiada bandingnya dan beliau bersungguh-sungguh hingga menjadi salah seorang imam besar dalam [bidang] tafsir, hadith, al-Kitab, Sunnah, ushul, dan bahasa Arab.

'Ali al-Qari, al-Mirqat [8/251],

Akan jelas bagi siapa pun yang berkeinginan membaca penjelasan Manazil as-Sa'irin (yakni Madarij as-Salikin), bahwa mereka [Ibn Taymiyyah dan Ibn al-Qayyim] termasuk orang-orang besar dari Ahl us-Sunnah wal-Jama'ah, dan termasuk para wali ummah ini.
